description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a robust, rounded body and a short neck, typical of urban pigeons. Its plumage is predominantly gray with subtle iridescent hues on the neck and head, and darker shading along the wings and tail. The head is small and rounded, featuring a short, straight beak that is pale at the tip. The wings are broad and the tail is relatively short and squared off, with faint banding visible. The legs are short and appear to be a pale pinkish-gray color. This bird is commonly seen in city environments, often foraging on sidewalks, plazas, and parks.
description: A medium-sized, gray urban pigeon with iridescent neck feathers, a short pale beak, and a squared tail. Its body is robust and rounded, with subtle color gradients and short, pale legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full profile, highlighting the rounded body, broad wings, and squared tail.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the small, rounded head, short beak, and the symmetry of the body and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile and the subtle iridescence on the neck.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail's squared shape, the back's feather pattern, and the alignment of the wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mostly solid gray with subtle iridescent patches on the neck and faint dark banding on the wings and tail.
